texto: Like poetry, in times of intense emotion the image returns to me. Like poetry, it stroked my soul and, by turns, lulled and stoked my senses.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lisa St. Aubin de Terán: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Like poetry, in times of intense emotion the image returns to me. Like poetry, it stroked my soul…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, poetry, times pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: My head was a desolate place and as barren as the bare hills of Le Marche. Until I began to build in it, only vultures nested there.
explicacao: Citação de Lisa St. Aubin de Terán sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “My head was a desolate place and as barren as the bare hills of Le Marche. Until I began to build…” articula reflexao, creativity, imagination em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como imagination.

frase_original: My head was a desolate place and as barren as the bare hills of Le Marche. Until I began to build in it, only vultures nested there.

texto: The palace started as a single vaulted room and grew in proportion to my despair. It began as an exercise to keep my mind from its melancholy, then it became a dream and a necessity. . . . I built a temple in my head. . . . Its hallways were as lofty as a cathedral, and the arch of each window as supple as a bow. Its corridors were the passages of my own brain.
explicacao: Citação de Lisa St. Aubin de Terán sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “The palace started as a single vaulted room and grew in proportion to my despair. It began as an …” articula motivacao, construction, content em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e content.
